title: Threshold Breached Event
description: Emitted when a dashboard metric crosses a defined threshold boundary.

metadata.description: Standard D2-2 Event Metadata — 10 fixed fields.

source.description: System component that produced the event.

source_version.description: Version of the source system emitting this event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

region.description: Geographic region where the event originated.

correlation_id.description: Correlation ID linking related events in a causal chain.

user_id.description: User or service principal that triggered the event.

threshold_id.description: Unique identifier of the threshold rule that was breached.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric that breached the threshold.

metric_value.description: Current value of the metric at the time of breach.

threshold_value.description: Configured threshold value that was crossed.

direction.description: Direction of the breach relative to the threshold.

breached_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the breach was detected.

entity_type.description: Type of entity the metric belongs to (e.g. host, service, container).

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g. percent, bytes, ms, count).

previous_value.description: Value of the metric prior to the breach.

percentage_change.description: Percentage change from the previous value.
